acquisition method: A data-dependent acquisition (DDA) method was employed.
fragmentation method: the TMDs were cleaved reasonably well in the gas phase by HCD.
instrument: A Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific) was used for all CZE-MS/MS analyses.
labeling: the sample preparation procedure (SDS-based protein extraction and MU-based sample cleanup) is efficient for extraction and preparation of proteins including membrane proteins from bacterial and human cells.
